visual_description: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue coat over a beige turtleneck, peeks from behind a white door frame while holding a knife in her right hand. She smiles broadly, raises the knife, and looks toward the left side of the frame. The background shows a white wall with vertical lines and a piece of fabric attached to the door.
audio_description: The audio contains a rapid, high-pitched vocalization. No other sounds are clearly audible.
